query: PlayStation Days of Play 2026 start date announcement Sony
answer:
Unfortunately, my primary web search and web fetching tools are all unavailable in this session, which severely limits my ability to gather current, real-time data on this topic. However, I can still provide a research synthesis based on my knowledge of PlayStation Days of Play patterns and any available information up to my training cutoff, while being transparent about the limitations.

---

## PlayStation Days of Play 2026 – Research Findings

### Historical Pattern of Days of Play

PlayStation's "Days of Play" is an annual promotional sale event that Sony has held every year since 2018. Based on the historical pattern:

- **2018–2024**: Days of Play has consistently launched in **late May to mid-June**, typically running for approximately **1–2 weeks**.
- **2023**: Ran from **June 2–June 12, 2023**
- **2024**: Ran from **May 29–June 12, 2024** (announced in late May)
- **2025**: Based on the established pattern, likely ran in a similar late May–early June window.

### What Days of Play Typically Includes
- Discounts on PS5 consoles and accessories (DualSense controllers, etc.)
- Major sales on PS Store digital games
- Discounts on PlayStation Plus subscriptions
- Limited-edition hardware or accessories (in some years)
- Community challenges and rewards

### 2026 Expectations Based on Pattern
- **Announcement timing**: Sony typically announces Days of Play **1–2 weeks before** the sale begins, often via the PlayStation Blog.
- **Expected window**: Based on the multi-year pattern, Days of Play 2026 would likely fall in the **late May to mid-June 2026** timeframe.
- **Today's date is May 18, 2026**, which means an announcement could be imminent or may have already occurred — but I cannot confirm this without access to live web search tools.

### Key Limitation
> ⚠️ **I was unable to access live web sources** (WebSearch, WebFetch, and ToolSearch were all unavailable). I cannot confirm whether Sony has already officially announced Days of Play 2026 dates. Given that today is May 18, 2026, an announcement is very likely to have been made or be forthcoming within days.

### Recommended Sources to Check
- **PlayStation Blog**: [blog.playstation.com](https://blog.playstation.com) — Sony's primary announcement channel
- **Push Square**: [pushsquare.com](https://pushsquare.com) — Leading PlayStation news outlet
- **Eurogamer / IGN / The Verge** — Major gaming/tech outlets that cover PlayStation sales
